description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with elongated, exaggerated arms that extend upward and outward in a dramatic V-shape. The person is dressed in a sleeveless top and straight-cut pants, with visible seams and simple detailing. The figure stands upright with both feet flat on the ground, and the arms are raised above the head, merging into long, ribbon-like extensions. The head is proportionate to the body, with facial features and hair clearly modeled. The overall appearance is somewhat surreal due to the unnatural length and positioning of the arms, making the figure visually striking and unique.
description: A standing adult figure with extremely elongated, upward-stretching arms, dressed in a sleeveless top and pants, and featuring a stylized, upright posture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, torso, and both arms dramatically extended upward in a V-shape.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the body and the full length of the left arm's extension.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back, hair, and the convergence of both arms as they stretch upward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the body and the right arm's exaggerated extension.
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms raised overhead
attribute_hairstyle: long straight hair, parted to the side
